name: Ocean Thermal Energy Corp
summary: Ocean Thermal Energy Corporation develops proprietary renewable energy systems using Ocean Thermal Energy Conversion (OTEC), Seawater Air Conditioning (SWAC), and Lake Source Cooling (LSC) technologies. The company designs plants that extract energy from temperature differences between warm surface ocean water and cold deep seawater (~3,000 feet depth) to produce electricity, desalinated water, and air conditioning. Target markets include tropical and subtropical regions, U.S. Department of Defense bases, and the U.S. Department of Agriculture. No commercial projects have been completed to date.
